findings.title: Browser audit captured failed network requests
findings.description: 1 request(s) failed while CookieDough clicked through the app.
findings.recommendation: Fix failed requests or remove broken calls from the audited user paths.

findings.title: Clickable controls did not produce visible navigation or UI changes

evidence.message:
Clicked "ASSET MANAGEMENT LANE

5" on https://northstar-fairlight-advisor.vercel.app/ with no visible change
